caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt under a dark navy or black overcoat, is seated in front of a jungle-themed backdrop featuring lush greenery and a waterfall. The background includes the logo for the movie "JUMANJI" and the tagline "WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE." In the first frame, a green text box identifies the man as "NICK JONAS." Throughout the sequence, he is captured in a medium shot from the chest up. He begins by looking off to his right, then turns his gaze forward toward the camera, speaking with slight movements of his mouth and head. By the final frame, he is looking slightly downward and to his right. The lighting is consistent, and the background remains static as the man shifts his posture and focus during the interview-style clip.
